sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46354" key="zu/gwsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ζῠ´γ-ωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ζυγόν</foreign> IV) <sense id="n46354.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a balancing</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κατὰ τὴν ζύγωσιν</foreign>, of heavy oars, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1240.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Callix.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
